svg.text: five progressive shifts to overcome them
BECOME SKILLED IN THE SHAPING OF THOUGHTS

g.text: ‘these thoughts are unwholesome, they lead to discontentment’
disregard and do not give attention
teeth clenched, tongue to palate — restrain, subdue, overwhelm

svg.text: → the mind becomes internally steady, calmed, unified, and collected
ajjhattameva cittaṁ santiṭṭhati sannisīdati ekodi hoti samādhiyati
Whatever thought one wishes to think, one will think it.
Whatever thought one does not wish to think, one will leave it unthought.
